mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, item_type, reference_id, bookmarked_at, review_count FROM wrong_answer_bookmark ORDER BY id
SELECT id, user_id, item_type, reference_id, bookmarked_at, review_count FROM wrong_answer_bookmark WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, item_type, reference_id, bookmarked_at, review_count FROM wrong_answer_bookmark WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_answer_bookmark (user_id, item_type, reference_id, bookmarked_at, review_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{itemType}, #{referenceId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{reviewCount})
